# Pull Request

## What

Describe the change clearly.

## Why

Explain the motivation and user impact.

## How

- Key implementation details
- Trade-offs or limitations

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] Manual verification (if TUI/OAuth behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets/tokens.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
